title: Sakana AI launches Fugu, a multi-agent system exposed as one model API
friendlyTitle: Sakana made one AI API that can use many agents behind the scenes
summary: Sakana AI released Fugu and Fugu Ultra, an OpenAI-compatible API that routes requests through a pool of models and agents while presenting developers with a single model endpoint. The company positions the product as a way to improve complex task performance while reducing dependence on any one frontier-model provider.
friendlySummary: Sakana’s new Fugu tool lets developers call one AI model, while the system secretly chooses and coordinates several AI agents when the task is hard.
whyItMatters: For teams building AI products, this is another sign that orchestration may become as important as raw model size. If the approach works reliably, developers could get multi-agent behavior without maintaining custom routing, verification, and synthesis code themselves.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make advanced AI workflows easier to build, because developers may not need to design the whole team of agents themselves.
